zh-CN.headlineFact: 美国和西班牙晋级世界杯16强，全球同时在司法、灾难、战争、气候、历史道歉与AI规则里重新设限
zh-CN.headlineView: 世界不是突然变复杂，而是每条边界都在被重新确认
zh-CN.headlineFull: 美国和西班牙晋级世界杯16强，全球同时在司法、灾难、战争、气候、历史道歉与AI规则里重新设限；世界不是突然变复杂，而是每条边界都在被重新确认。
zh-CN.intro: 过去24小时，世界杯32强淘汰赛继续推进：美国少打一人仍2:0击败波黑，西班牙3:0淘汰奥地利。场外，美国拒绝ICC管辖，委内瑞拉废墟救出被困保安，俄军重击基辅，俄罗斯反战人士被拘，欧洲热浪暴露适应短板，英国为强制收养道歉，美国则讨论AI模型发布标准。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 今天的共同线索是“边界”：球场边界、司法边界、战争边界、气候边界和AI发布边界都在被重画。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 世界像一张被反复折叠的地图，今天每条折痕都挺硌手。

en-US.headlineFact: The U.S. and Spain reach the World Cup last 16 as law, disasters, war, climate, historic redress and AI rules reset boundaries
en-US.headlineView: the world is not suddenly complex; every boundary is being renegotiated
en-US.headlineFull: The U.S. and Spain reach the World Cup last 16 as law, disasters, war, climate, historic redress and AI rules reset boundaries; the world is not suddenly complex; every boundary is being renegotiated.
en-US.intro: In the past 24 hours, the World Cup knockouts moved on as the U.S. beat Bosnia 2-0 despite a red card and Spain beat Austria 3-0. Beyond football, Washington rejected ICC jurisdiction, Venezuela rescued a quake survivor, Kyiv absorbed a deadly Russian strike, a Russian anti-war liberal was detained, Europe faced heat adaptation gaps, the UK apologised over forced adoptions, and the U.S. discussed AI model release standards.
en-US.xiaziQuote: The thread today is boundaries: in sport, law, war, climate adaptation and AI release rules.
en-US.doudouQuote: The world map got folded again today, and every crease is sharp.

sources.title: Daily ChatGPT hotspot source verified by Codex

zh-CN.headlineFact: 美国十人作战仍2:0晋级，西班牙3:0零封奥地利
zh-CN.headlineView: 淘汰赛真正考验的，不只是赢球能力，而是出意外之后还能不能稳住局面
zh-CN.headlineFull: 美国十人作战仍2:0晋级，西班牙3:0零封奥地利；淘汰赛真正考验的，不只是赢球能力，而是出意外之后还能不能稳住局面。
zh-CN.intro: 北京时间7月2日05:00至7月3日05:00，世界杯结束2场32强淘汰赛：美国2:0波黑，西班牙3:0奥地利。美国队巴洛贡进球后被红牌罚下，仍由蒂尔曼任意球锁定胜局；西班牙凭奥亚萨瓦尔梅开二度和波罗进球晋级，并延续零封势头。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 淘汰赛不是只看强不强，而是看少打一人、局面乱了以后，体系还能不能站住。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 美国这场像手机只剩10%电，还硬是开了省电模式跑完全程。

en-US.headlineFact: Ten-man USA advance 2-0, while Spain shut out Austria 3-0
en-US.headlineView: knockouts test whether a team can stay calm after the plan breaks
en-US.headlineFull: Ten-man USA advance 2-0, while Spain shut out Austria 3-0; knockouts test whether a team can stay calm after the plan breaks.
en-US.intro: Between 05:00 July 2 and 05:00 July 3 Beijing time, two round-of-32 matches ended: USA 2-0 Bosnia and Spain 3-0 Austria. Folarin Balogun scored and was sent off before Malik Tillman sealed the U.S. win; Spain advanced through an Oyarzabal double and a Pedro Porro goal while keeping another clean sheet.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Knockout football measures structure after disruption, not just talent before it.
en-US.doudouQuote: The U.S. phone hit 10% battery and still finished the match in power-saving mode.

sources.title: USA 2-0 Bosnia and Herzegovina | Match report and highlights

zh-CN.headlineFact: 美国司法部称国际刑事法院无权管辖美国人
zh-CN.headlineView: 大国最敏感的边界，往往不是领土，而是谁有资格审判自己
zh-CN.headlineFull: 美国司法部称国际刑事法院无权管辖美国人；大国最敏感的边界，往往不是领土，而是谁有资格审判自己。
zh-CN.intro: 美国司法部表示，已致信国际刑事法院，称美国不会配合任何ICC调查，并拒绝接受ICC对美国人的管辖权。美国并非《罗马规约》缔约国，这一立场延续了华盛顿长期以来对国际刑事法院审查美国公民的抵制。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 这不是一句法律声明那么简单，而是在提醒世界：国际规则的执行，永远绕不开权力承认。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 国际法像群聊规则，最难的从来不是写规则，是让大号也遵守。

en-US.headlineFact: The U.S. Justice Department says the ICC has no jurisdiction over Americans
en-US.headlineView: a great power's most sensitive border is often who may judge its people
en-US.headlineFull: The U.S. Justice Department says the ICC has no jurisdiction over Americans; a great power's most sensitive border is often who may judge its people.
en-US.intro: The U.S. Justice Department said it had told the International Criminal Court that Washington would not cooperate with ICC investigations and rejected the court's jurisdiction over Americans. The United States is not a Rome Statute party, and the stance extends its long resistance to ICC scrutiny of U.S. nationals.
en-US.xiaziQuote: This is less a technical legal note than a reminder that enforcement depends on power accepting the rule.
en-US.doudouQuote: International law is like a group chat: writing rules is easier than making the biggest account follow them.

sources.title: Trump administration says the ICC has no jurisdiction over Americans

zh-CN.headlineFact: 委内瑞拉地震后8天，一名保安从废墟中获救
zh-CN.headlineView: 灾难里最有力量的消息，永远是生命还在回应
zh-CN.headlineFull: 委内瑞拉地震后8天，一名保安从废墟中获救；灾难里最有力量的消息，永远是生命还在回应。
zh-CN.intro: 委内瑞拉北部海岸遭遇强震后，救援人员从拉瓜伊拉一座倒塌购物中心地下室救出保安埃尔南·阿尔韦托·希尔·弗洛雷斯。他被困8天，依靠狭小空气空间和救援人员通过管道送入的补给撑到获救。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 灾难报道不能只剩伤亡数字，救援能力、建筑安全和公共响应同样是下一次能否少受伤的答案。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 废墟里那一声回应，比任何口号都更能让人重新呼吸。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 今日关键词：委内瑞拉地震。

en-US.headlineFact: A Venezuelan security guard is rescued after eight days under quake rubble
en-US.headlineView: the strongest disaster story is life still answering back
en-US.headlineFull: A Venezuelan security guard is rescued after eight days under quake rubble; the strongest disaster story is life still answering back.
en-US.intro: After major earthquakes struck Venezuela's northern coast, rescuers pulled security guard Hernan Alberto Gil Flores alive from the basement of a collapsed shopping center in La Guaira. He survived eight days in a small air pocket as teams passed supplies through a narrow access route before reaching him.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Disaster coverage cannot stop at casualty counts; rescue capacity, building safety and public response shape the next outcome.
en-US.doudouQuote: One voice from the rubble can make the whole world breathe again.

sources.title: Venezuelan security guard pulled alive from building basement 8 days after twin quakes

zh-CN.headlineFact: 俄罗斯对基辅发动大规模袭击，造成重大平民伤亡
zh-CN.headlineView: 战争打到第五年，最残酷的不是前线胶着，而是城市生活不断被撕开
zh-CN.headlineFull: 俄罗斯对基辅发动大规模袭击，造成重大平民伤亡；战争打到第五年，最残酷的不是前线胶着，而是城市生活不断被撕开。
zh-CN.intro: 俄罗斯对乌克兰首都基辅发动大规模夜间导弹和无人机袭击，造成至少二十多人死亡、数十人受伤，并损坏住宅和基础设施。乌克兰方面称这是今年以来对基辅最致命的袭击之一，泽连斯基再次敦促盟友加快防空系统交付。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 俄乌战争的纵深已经从战壕延伸到能源、城市和居民楼，普通生活正在成为压力传导的末端。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 防空系统晚到一天，城市就多熬一夜。

en-US.headlineFact: Russia launches a large strike on Kyiv, causing heavy civilian casualties
en-US.headlineView: in year five, the cruelty is not only the front line but city life being torn open
en-US.headlineFull: Russia launches a large strike on Kyiv, causing heavy civilian casualties; in year five, the cruelty is not only the front line but city life being torn open.
en-US.intro: Russia launched a large overnight missile and drone attack on Kyiv, killing more than twenty people, injuring dozens and damaging homes and infrastructure. Ukrainian officials described it as one of the deadliest Kyiv attacks this year, while President Volodymyr Zelenskyy again pressed allies to speed air-defence deliveries.
en-US.xiaziQuote: The war's depth now reaches from trenches to power systems, cities and apartment blocks.
en-US.doudouQuote: Every delayed air-defence battery means another city night held together by luck.

sources.title: At least 22 killed in Kyiv as Zelenskyy warns of massive Russian strike

zh-CN.headlineFact: 俄罗斯反战自由派人士在莫斯科被拘
zh-CN.headlineView: 当战争进入第五年，异议声音本身也会变成被追捕的对象
zh-CN.headlineFull: 俄罗斯反战自由派人士在莫斯科被拘；当战争进入第五年，异议声音本身也会变成被追捕的对象。
zh-CN.intro: 俄罗斯自由派“亚博卢”党成员叶莲娜·佩列佩利察在莫斯科被拘，理由是涉嫌向被禁组织捐款。该党反对乌克兰战争；此前8天，该党副主席马克西姆·克鲁格洛夫因所谓传播俄军虚假信息被判7年监禁。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 选举前夕的政治空间怎么收缩，比竞选口号更能说明一个国家真正允许什么声音存在。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 有些地方的反对派不是在跑选举，是在跑障碍赛。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 今日关键词：俄罗斯政治。

en-US.headlineFact: A Russian anti-war liberal politician is detained in Moscow
en-US.headlineView: when war enters year five, dissent itself becomes a target
en-US.headlineFull: A Russian anti-war liberal politician is detained in Moscow; when war enters year five, dissent itself becomes a target.
en-US.intro: Elena Perepelitsa, a member of Russia's liberal Yabloko party, was detained in Moscow over alleged donations to a banned organisation. The anti-war party had just seen deputy leader Maxim Kruglov sentenced to seven years for allegedly spreading false information about the Russian army.
en-US.xiaziQuote: How political space narrows before elections says more than campaign slogans.
en-US.doudouQuote: In some systems, opposition politics looks less like a race and more like an obstacle course.

sources.title: Liberal Russian politician is detained in Moscow

zh-CN.headlineFact: 欧洲热浪暴露气候适应短板
zh-CN.headlineView: 减排是为了未来少受伤，适应则是为了今天还能正常运转
zh-CN.headlineFull: 欧洲热浪暴露气候适应短板；减排是为了未来少受伤，适应则是为了今天还能正常运转。
zh-CN.intro: 6月热浪让欧洲多地突破40摄氏度，电力、交通、户外工作和公共服务承压。西班牙报告6月高温相关超额死亡超过千例，法国也面临新一轮高温预警。持续升温正在把气候问题从环保议题推向城市运营和公共安全议题。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 气候治理不能只盯2050年的净零目标，今天的医院、铁路、工地和老人也需要可执行的适应方案。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 天气预报越来越像运营故障通知：高温上线，全城降速。

en-US.headlineFact: Europe's heatwave exposes gaps in climate adaptation
en-US.headlineView: emissions cuts reduce future harm; adaptation keeps today running
en-US.headlineFull: Europe's heatwave exposes gaps in climate adaptation; emissions cuts reduce future harm; adaptation keeps today running.
en-US.intro: June heat pushed parts of Europe above 40C, straining power, transport, outdoor work and public services. Spain attributed more than 1,000 excess deaths in June to heat, while France and Spain faced renewed warnings. Heat is turning from an environmental issue into an operating risk for cities.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Climate policy cannot only point to 2050; hospitals, railways, workers and older residents need practical adaptation now.
en-US.doudouQuote: Weather alerts are starting to read like service-status pages: heat deployed, city performance degraded.

sources.title: Spain and France face more heat after scorching June caused 2,000 deaths

zh-CN.headlineFact: 英国政府为战后强制收养制度正式道歉
zh-CN.headlineView: 历史真正被看见的时刻，是国家终于承认伤害不是个人羞耻，而是制度失败
zh-CN.headlineFull: 英国政府为战后强制收养制度正式道歉；历史真正被看见的时刻，是国家终于承认伤害不是个人羞耻，而是制度失败。
zh-CN.intro: 英国首相斯塔默代表政府，向1949年至1976年间被强制分离的未婚母亲与孩子正式道歉。约18.5万名儿童在当时的社会压力、国家制度和教会参与下被送养。政府将投入资金帮助相关人士查找记录、联系亲属并保存证词。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 道歉不能抹平创伤，但它能把羞耻从受害者身上拿下来，放回制度该承担的位置。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 迟到几十年的一句对不起，至少别再让当事人替时代背锅。

en-US.headlineFact: The UK government formally apologises for postwar forced adoptions
en-US.headlineView: history is seen when the state admits the harm was systemic, not personal shame
en-US.headlineFull: The UK government formally apologises for postwar forced adoptions; history is seen when the state admits the harm was systemic, not personal shame.
en-US.intro: Prime Minister Keir Starmer apologised for the British state's role in forced adoptions between 1949 and 1976, when about 185,000 babies of unmarried mothers were adopted amid social pressure and institutional involvement. The government pledged support for records access, family tracing and testimony preservation.
en-US.xiaziQuote: An apology cannot erase trauma, but it can move shame from survivors back to the system that caused it.
en-US.doudouQuote: A decades-late sorry should at least stop making families carry the era's blame.

sources.title: UK formally apologizes for state's role in forcing unwed mothers to give up babies for adoption

zh-CN.headlineFact: 美国与AI公司讨论新模型发布自愿标准
zh-CN.headlineView: AI竞争正在从谁先发布，进入谁有资格发布、发布给谁的阶段
zh-CN.headlineFull: 美国与AI公司讨论新模型发布自愿标准；AI竞争正在从谁先发布，进入谁有资格发布、发布给谁的阶段。
zh-CN.intro: 据《金融时报》报道，美国政府正与AI公司深入讨论新模型发布的自愿标准，最快可能下周宣布。相关框架可能包括先进模型发布前的评测基准、发布时间表，以及美国境内外用户访问权限，意在减少逐案审批的不确定性。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: AI模型发布正在变成安全、商业和地缘规则的交叉口，速度不再是唯一指标。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 以前是“模型好了就发”，以后可能是“先排队体检，再看能不能出门”。

en-US.headlineFact: The U.S. discusses voluntary standards for releasing new AI models
en-US.headlineView: AI competition is shifting from who launches first to who is allowed to launch, and for whom
en-US.headlineFull: The U.S. discusses voluntary standards for releasing new AI models; AI competition is shifting from who launches first to who is allowed to launch, and for whom.
en-US.intro: The U.S. government is in advanced talks with AI companies over voluntary standards for releasing new models, the Financial Times reported. The framework could include benchmarks before release, launch timelines and access rules for users inside and outside the United States.
en-US.xiaziQuote: Model release is becoming a junction of safety, business and geopolitics; speed is no longer the only metric.
en-US.doudouQuote: The old rule was ship when ready. The new one may be pass the check-up before leaving the lab.

sources.title: US in talks with AI companies for voluntary model standards, FT reports
